Empower. Innovate. Propel. – Master Your Future with In My Academy

Discover cutting-edge, project-based learning that turns skills into global triumphs. Enroll in flagship courses, compete for thrilling prizes, and launch your (or your child’s) career on

What Makes In My Academy Unique?

What Makes In My Academy Unique?
We're more than a platform—we're a global powerhouse redefining education with interactive, real-world mastery that excites, engages, and empowers you to achieve the impossible.

In My Academy is a cutting-edge educational hub, blending project-based tasks, competitive progression, and career-focused pathways to equip learners with skills that shine in the real world. Imagine the rush of diving into hands-on quests that build confidence, creativity, and connections—while competing for rewards that open doors to exciting futures.

Shaping Global Talent, Transforming Futures

Imagine your child competing on an international stage—London, Dubai, Singapore, or Mumbai—showcasing their skills, earning global recognition, and securing life-changing rewards that open doors to a brighter future.

At In My Academy, we are not just revolutionizing education—we are redefining how talent is discovered, nurtured, and celebrated worldwide. Our innovative learning model and international competitive structure empower students with real-world skills, global exposure, and career-defining opportunities. Join us in shaping the future of education—where learning meets limitless possibilities, unlocking a truly brighter future.

Join the Future of Personalized Education

At In My Academy, we combine AI-powered learning, custom career courses, academic support, and real-world competitions to deliver a truly personalized education experience. Design your own learning path, build real skills, and stay ahead. Sign up to stay informed and get early access to exclusive opportunities!

Express Your Interest

Challenge Yourself to Success with Our Competition Mode Learning System!

Discover Your Potential

Explore a diverse range of courses designed to help you unlock your full potential. Whether you’re interested in business, media, politics, law, technology, languages, or project management, we have something for everyone.

Compete, Learn, Succeed

Join our competition mode learning system and put your skills to the test. Complete courses, participate in challenges, and earn rewards for your achievements. Plus, take advantage of our advanced course options to further enhance your knowledge and skills.

Connect and Grow

Connect with peers who share your interests and goals. Share your progress, engage in discussions, and access additional resources such as career guidance and mentorship to support your personal and professional growth

Why Choose In My Academy?

Career-Ready, Practical Skills

Our courses align with real-world industry demands, equipping students with in-demand skills that employers seek.

Hands-On, Project-Based Learning

Learning by doing! Students engage in real-life projects, interactive tasks, and practical scenarios that build expertise.

Global Recognition & Competitions

Top achievers earn a chance to compete in prestigious international events across major cities, winning cash prizes, certifications, and career-enhancing recognition.

Entrepreneurship & Innovation Focus

We cultivate future leaders, innovators, and entrepreneurs, empowering young minds to create meaningful impact in the world.

How It Works at InMyAcademy

Sign Up

Enroll in your desired course on our platform.

Complete the Course

Finish the course within the specified timeframe.

Challenge Yourself

Enter Competition Mode to test your skills.

Win Cash Prizes

Compete and stand a chance to win exciting cash prizes!

Select Your Career Path

Choose from exciting, career-oriented courses: Investment Banking, Digital Marketing, Entrepreneurship, Technology, Languages, Politics, and more.
Step 01

Interactive, Project-Based Learning

Complete structured, engaging video lessons and practical tasks designed by industry experts, gaining real-world skills step-by-step.
Step 02

Qualify for International Competitions

Outstanding performance in courses qualifies students for our prestigious annual global competition events.
Step 03

Compete Internationally & Win

Students compete live against peers worldwide, earning international recognition, highlevel cash prizes, scholarships, and career-boosting opportunities.
Step 04

The Annual Global Finals—Where Talent Meets Opportunity

Bringing together the brightest young minds from across the globe, our Annual Global Finals take place in major international cities, offering a thrilling and fair competition on a global stage.

Rewards That Shape Your Future

  • Exciting Cash Prizes
  • Global Recognition & Prestigious Certifications
  • Networking & Career Advancement

Empowering Futures, One Skill at a Time

For Students

"Compete. Succeed. Shine on a Global Stage."
Showcase your talent, earn international recognition, and unlock life-changing opportunities with In My Academy.

For Parents

"Invest in Your Child’s Success."
Prepare your child for a thriving future with hands-on learning, global exposure, and career-building recognition.

Make Your Own Course: Tailored Learning, Unlimited Possibilities

The Make Your Own Course provides a fully personalized learning experience designed for students, professionals, and institutions seeking customized educational solutions. Each course is tailored based on the learner’s goals, skill levels, and career objectives.

Customized Learning Pathways
  • Courses are built from scratch based on the learner’s requirements.
  • Offers flexible learning modules, skill levels, and career-focused outcomes.
Certification Options
  • Includes certifications based on career requirements.
  • Partnerships with industry bodies for recognized credentials.
Specialized Trainers
  • Access to expert trainers tailored to the course subject.
  • Industry professionals provide mentorship and guidance.
Flexible Delivery Modes
  • Self-paced, live online, and hybrid models available.
Final Submission
  • Completion includes a final project tailored to the learner’s career goals

Target Audience

  • Individual learners seeking career advancement.
  • Schools and institutions requiring custom modules.
  • Corporates investing in employee upskilling.

Get Involved

Strategic Partnerships

Partner With Us to Redefine Global Education

At In My Academy, we believe meaningful change begins with collaboration. Our strategic partnerships enable schools, institutions, organisations, and government bodies to co-create high-impact learning opportunities for students across the globe.

We welcome partnerships that involve:

Co-hosting or promoting SkillStorm Global Competitions

Developing regional innovation and skill-based programs

Supporting outreach and access initiatives

Facilitating workshops or educational campaigns

We are open to custom collaboration models that align with your mission.

Ready to collaborate?

Please fill in the form below and our partnerships team will get in touch with you.

Sponsorship

Make an Impact Through Sponsorship

Sponsoring In My Academy is more than just brand exposure — it’s a chance to invest in the next generation of global thinkers and innovators. Sponsors help us deliver high-quality competitions, reach underserved learners, and celebrate outstanding talent.

Sponsorship opportunities include:

Supporting competition categories or age groups

Contributing to scholarship funds or prize pools

Co-branding outreach and recognition campaigns

Funding access for underrepresented students

We offer flexible, visible, and high-impact sponsorship packages.

Interested in becoming a sponsor?

Please fill in the form below and our team will follow up with details.

Mentorship & Judging

Share Your Expertise with the Next Generation

We invite professionals, educators, and subject-matter experts to join us as mentors and judges in our global competitions. Your guidance can have a lasting impact on young learners who are eager to grow, compete, and innovate.

Opportunities include:

Mentoring top-performing finalists before global rounds

Judging creative, business, or tech-based competition entries

Leading a virtual workshop or webinar in your domain

Mentorship and judging roles are flexible, rewarding, and recognized.

Want to become a mentor or judge?

Fill in the form below to express your interest.

Outreach & School Engagement

Help Us Reach More Learners Globally

Are you part of a school, educational network, or local community that supports youth development? Become an outreach partner and help students access global competitions, skill based learning, and innovation challenges

You can support by:

Promoting competitions and programs in your school or area

Hosting an info session or awareness drive

Leading a virtual workshop or webinar in your domain

Organising local clubs or prep groups around SkillStorm themes

Let’s work together to expand access and inspire young minds worldwide.

Interested in outreach collaboration?

Please complete the form below and we’ll reach out with next steps.

FAQ’S

Learn Your Best Education Culture with InMyAcademy

Discover a rich educational culture tailored to your learning journey at InMyAcademy.

  • General Questions
  • Community
  • Support
What is InMyAcademy?

InMyAcademy is an online educational platform designed to provide a wide range of courses and resources to learners of all ages and backgrounds.

What types of courses are available on InMyAcademy?

InMyAcademy offers courses across various subjects, including but not limited to, academic subjects like math, science, and language arts, as well as professional development courses, skill-based workshops, and hobby-related classes.

Who can benefit from using InMyAcademy?

InMyAcademy caters to learners of all levels, from elementary school students to working professionals seeking to enhance their skills or explore new interests. Whether you're a parent looking for supplemental resources for your child's education or an adult learner pursuing personal or career development, InMyAcademy has something for everyone.

Can I contribute to InMyAcademy as an instructor or content creator?

Yes! InMyAcademy welcomes educators, experts, and content creators to contribute to our platform by designing and teaching courses. If you have expertise in a particular subject or skill and are passionate about sharing your knowledge with others, we encourage you to apply to become an instructor.

How can I provide feedback or suggestions for improving InMyAcademy?

We value your feedback and suggestions for enhancing InMyAcademy's user experience and course offerings. You can share your thoughts by contacting our support team directly or participating in surveys and feedback sessions that we periodically conduct.

Is there a community forum or discussion platform for InMyAcademy users?

Yes! InMyAcademy provides a community forum or discussion platform where users can interact with fellow learners, ask questions, share insights, and engage in discussions related to course topics or educational interests. Join the conversation and connect with like-minded individuals!

How can I get help with technical issues or platform navigation?

If you encounter technical difficulties or need assistance navigating the platform, please reach out to our support team for help. You can contact us via email at [email protected] or use the live chat feature on our website for immediate assistance.

I'm experiencing technical issues with accessing or navigating the platform. What should I do?

If you encounter technical issues while using InMyAcademy, please reach out to our support team for assistance. You can contact us via email at [email protected] or use the live chat feature available on our website for immediate assistance.

How do I enroll in a course or access my purchased courses?

To enroll in a course, simply browse our course catalog, select the course you're interested in, and click on the "Enroll" button. Once enrolled, you can access your purchased courses from your account dashboard, where you'll find all the courses you're currently enrolled in.
